ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "pp_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model type used for emotion recognition */,
  "emotion" INTEGER /* Emotion label assigned to the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has given consent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "pp_no" TEXT /* Reference to the participant (pp_no) */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., marketing, mental health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_pp_no FOREIGN KEY ("pp_no") REFERENCES participants ("pp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "muscle_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each muscle activity entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "muscle" TEXT /* Muscle name involved in the trial */,
  "bin" TEXT /* Bin categorizing the muscle activity */,
  "zdiff" REAL /* Difference in emotion intensity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the muscle activity was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the muscle activity detection */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video from which the muscle activity was extracted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_muscle_activity_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion category */,
  "emotion_label" TEXT /* Label of the emotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the emotion */,
  "intensity_scale" TEXT /* Intensity scale used for the emotion (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emotion category */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of results for the trial */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the emotion recognition */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video from which the results were derived */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the results were recorded */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data or notes about the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
